觉者慕空","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6wjeEh2QHaUCfZw2esxJevdSYtDTv0SJn34fJvPBaml","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2da7f45607a841189a58e160e6a89962~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776534932\u0026x-signature=wkEVP9nEk2QUwDx8gS09zWd4rb4%3D","user_id":"1999376987742986","user_name":"亚平宁半岛的六级风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1999376987742986","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7391417276680915993","book_info":{"abstract":"故事包含惊悚元素，可能会引起不适，请谨慎阅读。\n一部集结了多篇扣人心弦的惊悚短篇小说的合集。\n每一章都呈现了一个独立的故事，带领读者走进不同的恐怖世界，体验不一样的惊悚之旅。从阴森的古宅到幽暗的森林，从寂静的夜晚到恐怖的梦境，每一个场景都让人毛骨悚然。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o76ca4944ecbed78be45a3b7bb01607e1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青衣旅人","author_id":"","book_id":"7391417276680915993","book_name":"恐惧之书","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081020","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":10,\"name\":\"悬疑\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10\u0026name=悬疑\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":100,\"name\":\"灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100\u0026name=灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7391417390082294297","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"136962"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"70","tags":"悬疑灵异,灵异,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3
